lessons.title: Hello & ABC
lessons.topic: Greetings and the sound of A

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What word do you use at the start of the day to greet someone?
questions.hint: It's said when you see someone after waking up.

questions.question_text: Find the word that begins with the same sound as 'alligator'.
questions.hint: It's something crunchy you can eat.

questions.question_text: What would you find in the sky on a warm sunny day?
questions.hint: It's a big bright star that shines during the day.

items.example: I am saying hello to you.

steps.title: Ben's School Day
steps.text: Hello! I am Ben. This is my teacher. I have an apple. Hello, Teacher!

questions.question: Who is Ben saying hello to?

steps.explanation: Use 'I have' to say what you own.

steps.audio_text: Hello! I am Lucy. This is my teacher. I have a red apple.

steps.prompt: Say: Hello, I am a teacher.

questions.question_text: I ___ Ben. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'teacher'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hello' is a greeting.
What sound does 'apple' start with? (Reading comprehension)
'I am a student.' What is the correct answer?

lessons.title: Morning & Pets
lessons.topic: Daily Greetings and sounds of B and C

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What does the dog do when it's happy?
questions.hint: It's how dogs show they're happy.

questions.question_text: What sound does the bird make?
What does the cat like to chase?

steps.title: My Fun Morning
steps.text: Good morning! I am happy. I have a blue ball. This is my cat. Hello, Cat!

questions.question: Who does he say hello to?

steps.explanation: Use 'I see' for things you look at.

steps.audio_text: Good morning! I am happy today. This is my big, brown cat. What do you have?

questions.question_text: I have a ___. (Grammar question)
Which picture shows a 'morning'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Fine' can be used to say how you feel.
What sound does 'C' make at the start of 'cat'?
Who says 'Good morning' in the story? (Comprehension question)

lessons.title: My Friend
lessons.topic: Identity and sounds of D and E

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal can both swim and walk, making a sound like 'quack'?
questions.hint: This animal also waddles on land.

questions.question_text: What animal has curly wool and loves to munch on grass?
questions.hint: We often see them in big groups.

questions.question_text: Who has long ears and says 'hee-haw', helping farmers carry things?

items.example: I have an egg to eat.

steps.title: My Special Day
steps.text: This is Emma. She is a girl. Emma has a pet dog. The dog is her friend. 'I have an egg for you,' she says.

questions.question: What does Emma have for the dog?

steps.explanation: Use 'I have a' to show things you own.

steps.audio_text: Hi! I am a boy. This is my friend, Ella. Ella has a dog and a big egg.

questions.question: What does Ella have besides a dog?

questions.question_text: This is my ___. (Grammar question)
Which word starts with the sound 'D'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'This is my dog.' is correctly using the pattern.
What is the sound at the start of 'egg'?
Who can be a friend?

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which fruit starts with the same sound as 'Apple'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'a' sound like in 'apple'.

questions.question_text: What starts with the same sound as 'Elephant'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'e' sound like in 'elephant'.

questions.question_text: Which food begins with the same sound as 'Carrot'?
questions.hint: Listen for the 'c' sound like in 'carrot'.

steps.title: Anna's Garden
steps.text: Hello! I am Anna. This is my garden. I have flowers and a bird. The bird sings.

questions.question: What does Anna have in her garden?

steps.audio_text: Hi, I am Emma. This is my small orange cat. She loves to play and is very friendly.

steps.prompt: Say: I am happy and this is my book.
steps.expected_text: i am happy and this is my book

questions.question_text: I ___ Ben. (Grammar question)
Which emoji shows 'teacher'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: 'Hello' is a greeting.
What is the first letter of 'Elephant'?
Complete: This is my ___ cat. (Reading comprehension)
